prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.9 kg; Height 151.7 cm; BMI 33.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 121/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.8%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 243mg/dL; 9 months ago 223mg/dL; 6 months ago 235mg/dL; 3 months ago 187mg/dL; current 225mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 75.8kg; 9 months ago 77.2kg; 6 months ago 72.7kg; 3 months ago 75.8kg; current 76.9kg), Height (12 months ago 151.7cm; 9 months ago 151.7cm; 6 months ago 151.7cm; 3 months ago 151.7cm; current 151.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 122mmHg; 6 months ago 122mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 121mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 29U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 34U/L; current 30U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; current 34mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 85mg/g; 9 months ago 122mg/g; 6 months ago 97mg/g; 3 months ago 143mg/g; current 140mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 112mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 118mg/dL; 3 months ago 114mg/dL; current 124mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
